title: unfirehose/1.0 DataPoint
description: General-purpose metric data point. Compatible with Datadog, StatsD, and OpenTelemetry metric semantics.

metric.description: Dot-separated metric name. e.g. unfirehose.tokens.input, agent.cost.usd, mesh.cpu.percent

metricType.description: Determines aggregation: count=monotonic delta, gauge=point-in-time, rate=per-second, histogram=distribution within host, distribution=global distribution, set=unique count

value.description: Single number for count/gauge/rate/set, array for histogram/distribution batch submissions

tags.description: Key-value tags for filtering and grouping. e.g. { project: 'myapp', model: 'opus-4-6' }

interval.description: Interval in seconds for rate metrics

unit.description: Display unit. e.g. token, dollar, millisecond, byte, percent
